productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Bright Assorted Cream Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these cream socks from nike. Made of cotton lycra fabric, these socks are perfect for formal wear. Made of cotton lycra providing all-day comfort, stretch and moisture wicking properties The arch support offers a secure, stable Fit Greater shock absorption properties Rib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Sock care Machine wash cold in 30 degree water Use non-chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean
